initiative: Priority-store speed of service improvement pilot
assumptions: Top 30 stores from store_opportunity_ranking.csv; mean daily transactions 795.8; mean ticket $9.31; 90-day window; 2.0% repeat-visit lift. Pilot peak-hour staffing and queue management in priority stores.
measurement_plan: Before/after tracking in pilot stores vs matched controls over 90 days: NPS, CSAT, revisit intent, negative comment rate, speed-of-service theme frequency, drink consistency complaint rate, and repeat visit behavior. Reconcile weekly against POS transaction counts.
